# DeepSpot

> DeepSpot is a deep learning model that predicts spatial transcriptomics from H&E histopathology images. It uses a deep-set neural network to model spots as bags of sub-spots and integrates multi-level tissue details and spatial context using pretrained pathology foundation models.

## Key Facts

- Predicts gene expression from H&E-stained tissue images
- Supports spot-level resolution (Visium) via DeepSpot and single-cell resolution (Xenium) via DeepCell
- Won 1st place at the Autoimmune ML Challenge (Broad Institute of MIT and Harvard, 2025)
- Provides 8 TB of predicted TCGA spatial transcriptomics data (3,780 samples, 56M+ spots, 4 cancer types)
- Compatible with pathology foundation models: UNI, H-optimus-0, Phikon
- MIT licensed, Python 3.9+, PyTorch-based

## When to Use DeepSpot

- You have H&E histopathology images and want to predict spatial gene expression without running spatial transcriptomics experiments
- You need virtual spatial transcriptomics at spot-level (Visium) or single-cell (Xenium) resolution
- You want to use pretrained models to generate spatial transcriptomics for large cohorts (e.g., TCGA)

## Related Projects

- [AESTETIK](https://github.com/ratschlab/aestetik): Autoencoder for learning multi-modal spatial transcriptomics representations (used by DeepSpot for cross-sample integration)
- [DeepSpot2Cell](https://github.com/ratschlab/DeepSpot2Cell): Extension predicting virtual single-cell spatial transcriptomics from H&E using spot-level supervision

## Links

- Repository: https://github.com/ratschlab/DeepSpot
- Preprint: https://www.medrxiv.org/content/10.1101/2025.02.09.25321567v3
- Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/nonchev/TCGA_digital_spatial_transcriptomics
- Pretrained weights: https://zenodo.org/records/15322099

## Installation

```
git clone https://github.com/ratschlab/DeepSpot
cd DeepSpot
conda env create --file=environment.yaml
conda activate deepspot
python setup.py install
```

## Quick Start

```python
from deepspot.spot import DeepSpot  # spot-level (Visium)
from deepspot.cell import DeepCell  # single-cell (Xenium)
```

## Citation

Nonchev, K., Dawo, S., Silina, K., Moch, H., Andani, S., Tumor Profiler Consortium, Koelzer, V.H. and Rätsch, G. (2025). DeepSpot: Leveraging Spatial Context for Enhanced Spatial Transcriptomics Prediction from H&E Images. medRxiv. DOI: 10.1101/2025.02.09.25321567
